刘封不救关羽，一直是我想不通的事情。
也是三国的一大遗憾。
作者有想象力，也基于历史进程，对历史也了若指掌。对各地的地理风貌，风土人情都很了解。
前后衔接，很多前面挖的坑在后面都能填的上。
很多细节都能仔细描写。也能前后没有差别。
真是值得一看的佳作。真不错不错。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1742957302,"group_id":"6589956664315612167","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3joHaAg8yUUDbJXYrJr7EY=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"98469730665","user_name":"用户98469730"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"98469730665","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6589956664315612167","book_info":{"abstract":"三国鼎立之后，吕蒙白衣渡江偷袭荆州，如果关羽被救了，会是怎样的结局？穿越到乱世的刘封还不太习惯地趴伏在奔驰的战马上，星夜赶往麦城！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/9a60460e6aae1c08be22fd9ae81d9223","author":"寒塘鸦影","author_id":"","book_id":"6589956664315612167","book_name":"三国之蜀汉中兴","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201008","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":67,"name":"三国","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=67&name=三国&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6590057552069788174","read_count":"10150","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"5005242"},"relate_post_id":"","rela
